name: CompositeModal
description: Depth Stage C receipt — a MULTI-ROOT Modal ({dialog, backdrop}) whose BODY holds composed children rather than only static leaf parts: (1) a single composed child (a ds.card component-ref) and (2) a DYNAMIC child-collection — a ds.badge item template repeated over the arrayOf `items` prop (the repeat-over-collection channel). Exercises the dynamic child-collection channel on all four surfaces on top of the multi-root emitter path. NOT a census component and NOT wired into npm run generate / figma:plan — emitted on demand by examples/depth-composite/emit-composite-receipt.ts.

props.name: items
props.description: The dynamic child collection rendered inside the modal body — one ds.badge per record.

body.description: Stage C: the modal body holds composed children — a single ds.card plus a repeated ds.badge collection.

summary.description: A single composed child — a fixed instance of ds.card.

tags.description: A row container for the dynamic child-collection — badges hug and wrap as a horizontal pill row (a designer would never stack them full-width).

tag.description: The dynamic child-collection channel — a ds.badge template repeated over the arrayOf `items` prop.
